name: Moroccan Couscous
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut all vegetables into strips - julienned.
2. In a large saucepan, sauté onion until lightly browned.
3. Add vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
4. Transfer to a large pot and add carrots, turnips, and potato. Simmer for 15 minutes.
5. Lower heat and add zucchini and pepper. Cook for an additional 20 minutes.
6. Add garbanzo beans, tomato sauce, and spices. Cook until heated through.
7. In a separate pot, bring 2 1/2 cups of water to a boil. Add couscous, cover, and turn off the heat.
8. Let stand for 5-7 minutes. Fluff with a fork and serve with vegetables on top.
